title: 10 best herbal tinctures for gastroenteritis
description: Cornflower tinctures helps with gastroenteritis because of its unique composition, which has been traditionally used to soothe digestive issues. The tannins in cornflowers have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce inflammation and irritation in the stomach and intestines, providing relief from symptoms such as diarrhea, abdominal cramps, and nausea.
